name: HWM_DATA_SOURCE_USAGES_V
query: SELECT DataSourceUsagePEO.DATA_SOURCE_USAGE_ID , DataSourceUsagePEO.TM_ATRB_FLD_ID, DataSourceUsagePEO.DATA_SOURCE_ID , CASE WHEN DataSourceUsagePEO.USAGE_TYPE like '%ADMIN%' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END ADMIN_DS_FLAG, CASE WHEN DataSourceUsagePEO.USAGE_TYPE like '%USER%' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END USER_DS_FLAG, DataSourceUsagePEO.DEFAULT_FLAG , DataSourcePEO.DISPLAY_NAME , DataSourcePEO.DATA_SOURCE_CODE FROM HWM_DATA_SOURCE_USAGES DataSourceUsagePEO, HWM_DATA_SOURCES_VL DataSourcePEO WHERE DataSourceUsagePEO.DATA_SOURCE_ID = DataSourcePEO.DATA_SOURCE_ID (+)
